channel.title: Code Review on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Code Review on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot code review: Customization and configurability improvements
item.description:
Copilot code review now supports a firewall, custom setup steps, and independent runner configurations. It also reads custom instructions from the head branch to make testing and validation easier.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Fix pull request comments with Copilot cloud agent
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now lets you select “Fix with Copilot” from Copilot code review pull request comments. The action is available in the pull request’s main view and uses the Copilot cloud agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Restrict who can dismiss reviews in rulesets
item.description:
GitHub repository rulesets now support restricting who can dismiss pull request reviews. The feature is generally available and lets you control which users can clear review requirements.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: k8s: Open source maintainership in the age of AI
item.description:
Kubernetes says AI-assisted contributions are welcome, but maintainers must keep human accountability, transparency, and verification at the center. The community is also testing AI review tools such as Copilot and CodeRabbit to help with pull request review and maintainer workload.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Copilot code review: Analysis depth and efficiency updates
item.description:
Copilot code review now uses built-in file exploration tools from the Copilot CLI and SDK. GitHub says this improves review cost efficiency without changing the existing workflow.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review: AGENTS.md support and UI improvements
item.description:
Copilot code review now reads repository-level AGENTS.md files and adds a Request button to make it easier to ask Copilot for a review on draft pull requests. GitHub says these updates are generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review: New configurations and controls
item.description:
GitHub added new ways to configure Copilot code review, including organization runner controls, support for Copilot content exclusion, and removal of the repository custom instructions character limit.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot code review for Azure Repos is now in technical preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot code review for Azure Repos is in technical preview, adding on-demand pull request reviews inside Azure DevOps. It must be enabled before use.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Shape Copilot code review around your team
item.description:
GitHub is previewing updates to Copilot code review that let it adapt to a team’s tools and standards, and vary review depth based on change complexity. The post says two public previews are shipping on a unified agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Updates to GitHub Copilot billing and plans
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now uses usage-based billing for all users. Copilot code review also consumes GitHub Actions minutes, in addition to GitHub billing.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Easily apply Copilot code review feedback with Copilot cloud agent
item.description:
GitHub renamed Copilot code review’s “Implement suggestion” button to “Fix with Copilot”. The updated flow now includes a UI dialog for more control when applying suggestions with the Copilot cloud agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review: Comment experience improvements
item.description:
GitHub updated Copilot code review comments in the new pull requests experience to make them easier to scan and act on. The changes are available to all users opted into that experience and include grouped suggestions, severity levels, and an updated comment layout.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review comment types now in usage metrics API
item.description:
The Copilot usage metrics API now reports Copilot code review suggestions broken down by comment type. This adds a new copilot_suggestions_by_comment_type metric for analyzing code review activity.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot code review will start consuming GitHub Actions minutes on June 1, 2026
item.description:
GitHub Copilot code review will begin consuming GitHub Actions minutes starting June 1, 2026. The change applies to code review usage on pull requests.

  • Source: GitHub
